rulings.Case Title: JEWELL GERMANY et al VS. ASBESTOS COMPANIES et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Motion To Quash, And For Protective Order Staying The Deposition Of Plaintiff Jewell Germany
rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS DISCOVERY CALENDAR FOR TUESDAY, OCTOBER 15, 2013 IN DEPARTMENT 503 at 9:00 A.M., LINE 1, Defendant Kelly Moore Paint Co.¿s amended motion to quash and for protective order staying the deposition of plaintiff Jewell Germany is off calendar at the moving party¿s request. = (503/TLJ)
